programme.title: What On Earth - EP 1
programme.desc: Zachary's best friend Isabelle is convinced aliens are on Earth. She leads Zachary to an apartment where she believes aliens are living. It turns out to be their school teacher Mr Raffles's apartment! Embarrassed, Zachary goes back to Raffles' apartment to apologize, only to encounter a secret Raffles is hiding - with the arrival of 2 other aliens, Leonardo and Neela from the planet Zetabia.

programme.title: What On Earth - EP 2
programme.desc: Raffles is appalled at the idea of Zetabia invading Earth. He refuses to cooperate with Leonardo and Neela in returning to Zetabia. Returning without him would mean failing their mission so they attempt to transport him against his will. But their ship's computer has developed an attitude problem and refuses to transport anyone. To their horror they realise they're trapped here on Earth.

programme.title: The Way, Way Back
programme.desc: Duncan, a shy teenager, visits a beach house owned by his mother's boyfriend. Annoyed with everyone, he wanders away to a local water park and meets Owen, who helps him open up to the world.

programme.title: St. Vincent

programme.title: Lay the Favorite
programme.desc: Ambitious about living the life of a cocktail waitress, a lap dancer tries her luck in Las Vegas. However, her life takes an unexpected turn after she falls in love with a sports gambler.

programme.desc: After suffering from memory loss, a soldier returns to his former profession as a barber and attempts to escape persecution by the military forces.

programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a barren island, a robot named Roz must rapidly adapt to the wild. It soon forms an unlikely parental bond with an orphaned gosling, finding connection in isolation.

programme.desc: Urwah masih tidak mampu untuk berterus terang dengan Suri tentang siapakah sebenarnya dirinya. Manakala Pak Karim pula, sudah membuat keputusan untuk mengahwinkan Suri dan Urwah. Lakonan : Rita Rudaini, Azlee Khairi, Aqasha, Geofrey Williams dan Almy Nadia.

programme.title: Zoom In Bersama
programme.desc: Berhibur bersama Kumpulan New Boyz yang akan menghiburkan penonton dengan lagu-lagu popular mereka.

programme.title: Warisan Emas
programme.desc: Sebuah dokumentari yang akan mengupas sejarah, tamadun dan budaya warisan negeri-negeri di Malaysia. Setiap episod turut akan menampilkan pakar/ahli sejarah yang akan berkongsi fakta dan perspektif tentang ketamadunan dan warisan bangsa.

programme.title: Terlanjur Mencintaimu
programme.desc: Drama kemasyarakatan yang memaparkan tentang hubungan kekeluargaan, persahabatan dan percintaan. Lakonan : Reen Rahim, Ungku Ismail, Wan Hanafi Su, Nisha Dirr dan Syed Ali.

programme.title: Bersama TV2
programme.desc: Berhibur bersama penyanyi popular tanah air dengan lagu-lagu malar segar popular mereka.

programme.title: Seteguh Impian
programme.desc: Drama bersiri masyarakat yang sarat dengan pengajaran, konflik dalam kehidupan dan percintaan.

programme.title: Penutup
programme.desc: Siaran tamat.

programme.title: Pembukaan - Negaraku
programme.desc: Lagu Negaraku

programme.title: Kembara Sungai Johor
programme.desc: Dokumentari yang menyusuri keindahan dan sejarah Sungai Johor, menyingkap peranannya dalam kehidupan masyarakat setempat. Ia memaparkan budaya, tradisi dan warisan yang berkembang di sepanjang sungai ini yang menunjukkan kepentingannya dalam ekonomi dan sosial komuniti sekitar.

programme.title: Embok Belum Terbakar
programme.desc: Kisah masyarakat yang sarat dengan pengajaran, konflik dalam kehidupan dan percintaan. Lakonan: Arja Lee, Ramona Zamzam, Jue Aziz, Dato' Jalaluddin Hassan dan Zack X Factor.

programme.title: Tari Tradisi
programme.desc: Perkongsian mengenai tarian tradisional masyarakat tempatan daripada pelbagai budaya dan etnik yang sangat menarik, selain sarat dengan elemen budaya dan seni tempatan.

programme.title: Hanna Raudhah
programme.desc: Kisah liku-liku kehidupan Hanna Raudhah seorang gadis yang hidup dengan kemewahan dan pergaulan bebas. Suatu hari Hanna mendapati dirinya mengandung. Akibatnya, beliau telah dihalau oleh ibunya. Lakonan : Sara Ali, Zain Ruffeedge, Rahim Razali, Fauziah Nawi dan Afiq Muiz.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Khas Tahun 1 Ep01

programme.title: Lady General Hua Mu Lan
programme.desc: A young woman joins the army in place of her old, ailing father and only when she returns home is the truth revealed.

programme.title: The Bride From Hell
programme.desc: After a bride-to-be is discovered to be possessed, justice must be done and an exorcism performed before anyone can rest in peace.

programme.title: The Fighting Fool
programme.desc: It's Meng Yuan-wen versus Kuan Feng in this wild and wacky wushu saga about a priceless pole with a spectacular secret.

programme.title: My Dream Boat
programme.desc: This drama takes on a group of young people who get entangled in a web of love and emotions.

programme.title: The Killer Has No Return
programme.desc: As Wong Hei, a slick assassin, zeroes in on a millionaire named Shek, little does he expect to find himself the target of someone even more dangerous.

programme.title: The Younger Generation
programme.desc: After a young mother and her husband die, one child is sold into prostitution to feed the other four.

programme.title: Five Elements Ninjas
programme.desc: When evil ninjas brutally slaughter students from a noble Chinese kung-fu academy, the one survivor forms a powerful group to avenge his fallen comrades.

programme.title: Pursuit
programme.desc: Written and directed by Cheng Kang, this classic film starring Yueh Wah depicts how the Sung Dynasty army's chief instructor is framed by a corrupt minister.

programme.title: Dirty Ho
programme.desc: Master martial arts moviemaker Liu Chia-liang presents this brilliant kung fu comedy, incorporating, some of the best-executed fight sequences ever caught on film.

programme.title: Passing Flickers
programme.desc: This comedy contains dramatisations of some of the funniest and most surreal film gossips of director Li Han-Hsiang's 30 year career.

programme.title: To Kill a Mastermind
programme.desc: Founded by rogue martial artists, the Qisha gang's specialty is crime. When spies infiltrate the group, they become caught in a power struggle between the gang leader and his righthand man.

programme.title: Forbidden Tales of Two Cities
programme.desc: Li Han Hsiang directs this fascinating comedy about three couples and forbidden love across Macau and Hong Kong.

programme.title: Forever and Ever
programme.desc: Huangmei Opera queen, Ivy Ling Po stars in this tale of a young scholar who is manipulated into marrying a nobleman's reluctant daughter a girl who is dying.

programme.title: The Black Tavern
programme.desc: In this film, award winning actor Ku Feng stars as the 'Whip Devil' alongside Shih Szu as the 'The Lady Hermit' against the masters of mayhem.

programme.title: Dead End
programme.desc: Directed by Chang Cheh and starring Ti Lung in his first main role, this drama depicts how two lovers contend with family opposition and an unjust accusation.

programme.title: That Man in Chang-an
programme.desc: Yan Jun stars in this romantic Han dynasty adventure epic as a dying emperor alongside an evil queen, amidst plots and counterplots galore!

programme.title: A Maid From Heaven
programme.desc: This epic depicts the romance between the Jade Emperor's seventh daughter and a young village man. When Heaven and Earth meet, can a common ground be found?

programme.title: Trilogy of Swordsmanship
programme.desc: It's three times the substance, style and stars, in this amazing motion picture featuring the work of three of Shaw Brother's finest martial arts directors.

programme.title: The Mad Monk
programme.desc: The Mad Monk rushes around saving hawkers from crumbling walls and bullies, recovering stolen money and punishing a ruthless court official and his son.

programme.title: Oath of Death
programme.desc: When Sung Dynasty patriot Chin Liang runs afoul of a corrupt acquaintance, he is forced to avenge the villain's treachery via a self-sacrificing oath.

programme.title: The Magnificent Concubine
programme.desc: An emperor's obsession with his consort distracts him, allowing his cruel prime minister who also happens to be his consort's brother, to run the nation.

programme.title: Buddha's Palm
programme.desc: This new adaptation of the most powerful martial arts form is a cult classic for all fans. Witness breathtaking special effects.

programme.title: King Drummer
programme.desc: In Shaw Brothers' showcase for the talented Ling Yun, a young drummer hungry for fame sacrifices everything including love, for his art. Will the prize prove worth the cost?

programme.title: Godfather of Canton
programme.desc: When Commissioner Liu Ta-hua is arrested by special envoy Cheng for corruption, see how Lin, a coolie is unwittingly fated to play a role in his release.

programme.title: Hong Kong Rhapsody
programme.desc: A follow-up to the previous blockbuster, this 60's musical features an unemployed magician whose love life is as twisted as his tricks.

programme.title: Portrait in Crystal
programme.desc: Action - Tragic deaths in the underworld cause leader 'Yama' to suspect a portrait in crystal with mysterious powers. He sends Hen Pan and Pai Pan to interrogate its creator, martial artist Lung Fei.

programme.title: A Friend From Inner Space
programme.desc: Sek Kin takes a refreshing break from his usual villain's role, playing a friendly ghost who befriends a young boy and helps him reunite his separated parents.

programme.title: Let's Fall in Love

But everything suddenly changes when the college decides to suspend Hani after finding out one of the prank victims, Puteri, had attempted to commit suicide when her embarrassing prank video was released online. Now, her gang agree to demote Hani.

This had Imran thinking that his mother is possibly practicing a black magic called Susuk. Imran asks for advice from a religious man in the mosque to help him remove the Susuk.

programme.title: You Mean The World To Me

programme.title: Satu Malam Perawan

programme.title: Cikgu Timah Sekolah Bandar
programme.desc: Kisah cikgu Timah yang sudah berkahwin dengan Imran dan berhijrah kembali ke Bandar. Cikgu Timah yang hamil mengalami alahan yang teruk. Pelbagai konflik telah berlaku dalam rumah tangga cikgu Timah. Haziq anak tirinya berusaha untuk memulihkan hubungan cikgu Timah serta ayahnya Imran.

programme.title: Walid Ep07

programme.title: Talentime

programme.title: Cicakman

programme.title: Magika

programme.title: Sembilu

programme.title: Mukhsin

programme.title: Maria Mariana
programme.desc: Maria dan Mariana dua adik beradik yang mempunyai perwatakan berbeza berdepan dengan konflik kehidupan dan percintaaan. Lakonan Erra Fazira dan Ziana Zain

programme.title: Yasin Terakhir
programme.desc: Setelah lama terpisah, dua sahabat karib ditemukan semula namun seorang daripada akan meninggalkan sahabatnya dan meminta dibacakan yasin terakhir. Dari arahan Rashid Sibir.

programme.title: Ibu Belum Mati

programme.title: Good Boys Go To Heaven Ep05

programme.title: Castle Falls
programme.desc: Kumpulan pesaing mencari jutaan wang yang disembunyikan di dalam hospital terbiar, namun mereka perlu berhadapan dengan pekerja binaan yang menemui barang rampasan itu terlebih dahulu.

programme.title: Magika

programme.title: Chomel

programme.title: Buli

programme.title: The Making of The Furious

programme.desc: SpongeBob befriends a sentient Krabby Patty whose only wish is to be eaten; Rube hosts an episode of "FUN-Believable! With Rube" where he explores little known oddities and attractions around Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: Den Bagus, Pinjam Cintanya Dong Seratus
programme.desc: It tells the story of a handsome young man named Bagus. It is said that Bagus was late in delivering flowers to Irene and her beautiful friends. But strangely, Bagus was not angry. programme.title: Geprek Aja Terus Cintaku Sampe Ke Penghulu
programme.desc: Ojan (Masaji Wijayanto) was tricked by a thug and had to pay for 3 portions of Nadia's (Larasati Nugroho) geprek chicken. Ojan's debt was because Nadia asked him to fix her motorbike which suddenly broke down. From Nadia's conversation with her father, it turns out that Ojan also just found out that the girlfriend Ojan wanted to meet was cheating on him with Nadia's boyfriend.

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In South Korea, Rooftop and Catfish take on some daring (and borderline stupid) activities. They become the first BMX bikers to every ride at the North Korean/South Korean boarder, scale Korea's skyscrapers, become sword-smiths, and train in the ancient art of tae kwon do. But the fun doesn't stop there. The duo find themselves in the center of a mud festival and trying out the tightrope art of ju

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In this special episode, we take you around the world for a look at never-before-seen shenanigans of the BMX duo, and you won't believe some of the activities that didn't make the previous episodes. programme.title: Yukon for Sale

programme.title: Yukon for Sale
programme.desc: Pregnant aircraft engineer Pam is looking to buy the perfect home; her wish list includes a rural setting and a lot of acres; a home off the grid and away from neighbors.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Tune in as Jean-Paul and the crew share their first day full day at duck camp with a morning in the duck blind and catfish on the jug line. At the end of the day they put their Cajun grocery goods together for an epic duck camp meal.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-7
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it's only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: Six Australians embark on one of the most thrilling and dangerous training courses Australia has to offer – saltwater crocodile wrangling - and are immediately thrown in at the deep end when an emergency at the farm means they have to help separate two giant males who are up for a blue.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: Renee is on the lookout for a missing croc. The men mess up their top-jaw roping practice and they have a runaway croc on their hands. Lyn tells John her tragic secret.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: The students learn about life and death on the farm as baby crocodiles hatch in their hands and they have to kill an adult. Repeated fumbling in roping practice leaves John livid with everyone and Lyn's frustration with diminutive Renee reaches boiling point.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: Renee catches a croc three times her size but Ryan is struggling. John takes Renee and Ryan on an overnight trip where they must share a motel room with crocodiles and the chance to go to Kakadu is on everyone's mind.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: Scientists from the University of Queensland come to the farm to practice artificial insemination techniques. Lyn tells the other students her heart-breaking secret and says she is considering a future in the crocodile industry. John reveals which two students are going to Kakadu.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: John takes Lyn and Luke to Kakadu where they raid nests and catch a four and a half metre male croc for research. Lyn returns to the place where her 11-year old granddaughter was taken by a croc and is finally at peace.

programme.desc: Flanked by three Australian States this journey re-traces part of the expedition undertakenby European Explorer Charles Sturt in the 1840's, when he was looking to discover an inland sea, inthe very interior of the country.

programme.title: Para Pencari Tuhan Jilid 13 Ep23
programme.desc: The story of Bang Jack's struggle to defend the mosque he had built. One day, something unexpected happened. Bahrudin came to sue Pak Jalal with complete documentation proving that the land where the mosque's mihrab now stood belonged to him because it was inherited from his ancestors.

programme.title: Suster El Ep24
programme.desc: The story of an orphaned girl named Elnara, who lives alone with her older sister, Resti. For the sake of Nara's dream of becoming a nurse, Resti works hard. Until finally Resti betrothed with Verdi who is rich. Nara is very happy because Resti's marriage has made their lives better, but in an instant Nara's happiness disappears.

programme.title: Tajwid Cinta Ep59
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia to marry Alina, but his plans shatter when he is forced into an arranged marriage with Syifa. Bound by his father's debt of gratitude, Dafri faces endless conflicts and drama.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie
programme.desc: Emmet, an ordinary individual prophesied to be the Special, is entrusted with the responsibility of saving the Lego world from the cruel ways of Lord Business.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: During a zombie apocalypse engineered by the Umbrella Corporation, Alice and a group of survivors journey across the country in search of supplies and a safe place.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: King Kong is transported out of his containment zone after Godzilla resurfaces and creates mayhem. Humans need his help to reach Hollow Earth and find a way to subdue the king of the monsters.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: The Decepticons are trying to learn the secrets of a stranded Cybertronian spacecraft. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must stop them before it is too late.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: John, son of Sarah Connor, sends a reprogrammed Terminator to protect his younger self, who also holds the key to humanity's survival, from the T-1000, an advanced robot created by Skynet.

programme.title: Shazam! Fury of the Gods
programme.desc: Bestowed with superpowers, Shazam and his foster siblings join forces against the daughters of Atlas who have stolen the Wizard's broken staff.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: Shrek is tired of his domesticated life and makes a deal with Rumpelstiltskin to live one day as a free ogre. But, this puts him in a dark alternate timeline where he never met his wife or friends.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: After Set, the Egyptian God of darkness, kills his brother and seizes the throne, he enslaves the kingdom. However, a flawed mortal, Bek, and the God of the sky Horus rise to challenge him.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: When a new criminal comes to town, the Anti-Villain League seeks out Gru in order to fight him off. Despite his initial refusal, Gru eventually agrees after his aide goes back to his evil ways.

programme.title: SEA Director Focus Interview : Lav Diaz
programme.desc: This project focusing on South East Asian Award Winning and Critically Acclaimed Directors and as part of the A-List Inspiring South East Asia Film maker's project.

programme.title: Norm Of The North: Keys To The Kingdom
programme.desc: When Norm returns to New York, he is falsely accused of a crime and must work with his pals to get the case dismissed while also protecting his kingdom in a winner-take-all hockey tournament

programme.title: School Spirits
programme.desc: A girl relocates to a small town only to find it inhabited by ghosts. A struggle against a bad spirit ensues to keep the town's children safe.

programme.title: Norm Of The North: King Sized Adventure
programme.desc: An ancient Chinese artifact has been stolen by a villainous archaeologist named Dexter. With the help of his Lemming friends, Norm must keep his word and embark on a journey across the world to help recover the artifact for the people of China.

programme.title: Mr. Birthday
programme.desc: While working his maintenance job at an upscale hotel, Barry encounters the mysterious Mr. Jay. He introduces Barry to the International Birthday Network, an agency that helps children across the globe suffering from miserable birthdays.

programme.title: Norm Of The North: Family Vacation
programme.desc: Overwhelmed with his Kingly duties, Norm's crown is stolen and he embarks on a journey to find it in conjunction with repairing his family's relationship.

programme.title: Merry Ex Mas
programme.desc: During a blizzard at christmas, a man becomes snowbound with ex-wife, her wealthy suitor, his former mother in law, and his daughter.
